title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 27 - 2017: Roman Timeline

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while high, discussing his work on a 'Roman Timeline' project spanning a thousand years. He mentions listening to Strabo for geographical research, doing his taxes (and receiving a return over $1000), visiting his mom, and someone coming to look at his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: it's a mind-fucker and he doesn't recommend others look at it yet
couldn't deal with not smoking weed at this time in his life
